mapper.sql: TO_CHAR(sm.year) || '-' || CASE sm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE sm.term END = #{semester}

SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, c.course_code, p.name AS professor, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, c.course_type, c.credits AS credit, ( SELECT LISTAGG(ss.day_of_week || ' ' || ss.start_time || '-' || ss.end_time, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time) FROM section_schedule ss WHERE ss.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS schedule, ( SELECT LISTAGG(room_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY room_name) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no AS room_name FROM section_schedule ss JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE ss.section_id = cs.section_id ) ) AS room, cs.capacity, COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0) AS enrolled, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart_item ci WHERE ci.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS cart_count, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) FROM enrollment e JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE e.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS rating, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollment e JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE e.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS review_count, CASE WHEN c.is_english = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_english, CASE WHEN COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0) >= cs.capacity THEN 'FULL' WHEN cs.capacity - COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0) <= 5 THEN 'CLOSING_SOON' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END AS seat_status, TO_CHAR(c.target_year) AS year FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = c.dept_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND

AND ( #{keyword} IS NULL OR LOWER(c.course_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(c.course_code) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(p.name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) AND ( #{courseCategory} IS NULL OR LOWER(c.course_type) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{courseCategory}) || '%' ) AND (#{major} IS NULL OR LOWER(d.dept_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{major}) || '%') AND (#{courseType} IS NULL OR c.course_type = #{courseType}) AND (#{credit} IS NULL OR c.credits = #{credit}) AND ( #{day} IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM section_schedule fss WHERE fss.section_id = cs.section_id AND fss.day_of_week = #{day} ) ) AND ( #{startTime} IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM section_schedule fss WHERE fss.section_id = cs.section_id AND fss.start_time >= #{startTime} ) ) AND ( #{endTime} IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM section_schedule fss WHERE fss.section_id = cs.section_id AND fss.end_time <= #{endTime} ) )
mapper.select:
ORDER BY rating DESC NULLS LAST, c.course_name, cs.section_no
ORDER BY cart_count DESC, c.course_name, cs.section_no
ORDER BY (cs.capacity - COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0)) DESC, c.course_name, cs.section_no
ORDER BY c.course_name, cs.section_no
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = c.dept_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND

SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, c.course_code, p.name AS professor, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, c.course_type, c.credits AS credit, ( SELECT LISTAGG(ss.day_of_week || ' ' || ss.start_time || '-' || ss.end_time, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time) FROM section_schedule ss WHERE ss.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS schedule, ( SELECT LISTAGG(room_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY room_name) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no AS room_name FROM section_schedule ss JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE ss.section_id = cs.section_id ) ) AS room, cs.capacity, COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0) AS enrolled, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart_item ci WHERE ci.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS cart_count, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) FROM enrollment e JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE e.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS rating, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollment e JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE e.section_id = cs.section_id ) AS review_count, CASE WHEN c.is_english = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_english, CASE WHEN COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0) >= cs.capacity THEN 'FULL' WHEN cs.capacity - COALESCE(cs.enrolled_count, 0) <= 5 THEN 'CLOSING_SOON' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END AS seat_status, TO_CHAR(c.target_year) AS year FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND (#{division} IS NULL OR cs.section_no = #{division}) ORDER BY cs.section_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT cs.syllabus_url FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE c.course_code = #{courseId} AND AND (#{division} IS NULL OR cs.section_no = #{division}) ORDER BY cs.section_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time, ss.end_time, cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no AS room FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN section_schedule ss ON ss.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE c.course_code = #{courseId} AND AND (#{division} IS NULL OR cs.section_no = #{division}) ORDER BY ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time

SELECT ua.email FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN user_account ua ON ua.user_id = p.user_id WHERE c.course_code = #{courseId} AND AND (#{division} IS NULL OR cs.section_no = #{division}) ORDER BY cs.section_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT ua.phone FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN user_account ua ON ua.user_id = p.user_id WHERE c.course_code = #{courseId} AND AND (#{division} IS NULL OR cs.section_no = #{division}) ORDER BY cs.section_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT rc.course_code FROM prerequisite pr JOIN course c ON c.course_id = pr.course_id JOIN course rc ON rc.course_id = pr.required_course_id WHERE c.course_code = #{courseId} ORDER BY rc.course_code FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT cs.section_id FROM course_section cs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE c.course_code = #{courseId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND AND (#{division} IS NULL OR cs.section_no = #{division}) ORDER BY cs.section_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_request (student_id, section_id, reason, status, requested_at) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{sectionId}, #{reason}, 'PENDING', SYSTIMESTAMP)
